name: October Snack Scan — Pita & Pretzel TPR
performance_requirement: Temporary price reduction to $2.49 (MF-SN-001) / $2.79 (MF-SN-002) at shelf for the full promo period.

name: November Sparkling Lemonade Endcap Display
performance_requirement: Endcap display in each committed store for a minimum of 3 weeks; signed display agreement and circular tear sheet as proof.

name: Cold Brew Oat Latte New Item Launch — Slotting Program
performance_requirement: Item authorized and shelved: regional phase (up to 900 stores) invoiced at $9,500; chainwide expansion phase invoiced at $42,000 upon distribution confirmation. Per contract section 4.

name: October Popcorn Scandown
performance_requirement: Advertised price of $2.99 or lower during the promo period.

name: Holiday Beverage Scandown — Lemonade & Tea
performance_requirement: Feature in at least two weekly circulars during the promo period.

name: Pita Chips Feature Ad Billback
performance_requirement: Front-page circular feature for at least two weeks of the promo period; billback payable per unit sold during feature weeks.

name: Fall Snack Scan — Pita Chips & Popcorn
performance_requirement: Shelf tag price reduction for the full promo period.

name: Sparkling Lemonade Holiday Scandown
performance_requirement: Advertised price of $7.99 or lower during the promo period.

name: December Pretzel Scandown
performance_requirement: Shelf tag price reduction to $2.99 for the full promo period.

name: Holiday In-Store Demo Program — Pretzels & Cold Brew
performance_requirement: In-store demo events on weekends; signed Proof-of-Performance form (Exhibit B, per contract section 3.4) and store execution report submitted within 30 days of each event.

name: Autumn In-Store Demo Program — Pita & Popcorn
performance_requirement: Weekend in-store demo events; signed Proof-of-Performance form (Exhibit B, per contract section 3.4) and store execution report within 30 days of each event.

name: Holiday In-Store Demo Program — Sparkling Lemonade
performance_requirement: Weekend in-store demo events; signed Proof-of-Performance form (Exhibit B, per contract section 3.4) and store execution report within 30 days of each event.
